what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-source image asset named company-info/p-13, holding YAML frontmatter metadata (id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, dimensions, source, author_session, created, links) and a one-line source note.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger entry for an image asset
image dimensions w and h are both 0
filename encodes channel design-source and path company-info/p-13
standards: w and h are recorded as 0 despite being an image
links array is empty so no related assets are listed
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, w, h, source, author_session, created, links
Filename uses double underscores and channel/path encoding
Acts as a metadata stub rather than storing the image itself
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting missing or placeholder image metadata
No descriptive caption or content description for the image
No links to related code, pages, or sibling assets
notes: A minimal ledger stub for a design-source JPEG with zero dimensions and no related links, labeled as ground truth.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0?
What visual content does company-info/p-13.jpg contain?
How is this image intended to be consumed by other files or systems?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth image; actual content is a metadata stub with a blob reference and zero dimensions, so it partially matches but lacks size and contextual metadata.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog a design-source image as authoritative ground truth for company-info/p-13, with traceable authorship and a stable blob reference.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, addressable metadata record that links a named design-source image to its blob, author session, creation timestamp, and channel, enabling retrieval and provenance tracking in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source JPEG image company-info/p-13 with zero recorded dimensions and a source ground-truth note.
intention_for_embedding: To register a design-source image asset as canonical ground truth for company-info/p-13 with provenance and a blob reference.
